name: Crab Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 pound crab meat (imitation works; chopped or broken)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or blender, blend cottage cheese and cream cheese until smooth. Transfer to a large bowl and stir in the remaining ingredients.
2. Spoon into a sprayed casserole dish and bake, covered, at 350°F for 25 minutes. Remove from oven, stir, and let cool, uncovered, for 5 minutes. Serve with crackers or tortilla chips.
